insight: Master Bot is described as appearing in casual matchmaking in disguise (indistinguishable from human or weaker bots to new players), identifiable mainly by longer computation time (~8 seconds per turn). A 'MasterBot 2016' version was mentioned as beatable by a new player, with community noting the AI had not significantly improved since then.
author: wontrice, supergreyman
context: New player discussing their record against bots and asking about the difference between casual bots and Master Bot.
